All tools run in your browser. No data is sent to any server.
⚡ Get PunamIDE — AI-powered desktop IDE for Windows

Home

Developer Tools

16 essential tools for your daily workflow. Everything runs in your browser — no data ever leaves your machine.

{} Format
JSON Formatter
Format, validate and minify JSON data
🔑 Security
JWT Decoder
Decode and inspect JWT token payloads
B64 Encode
Base64
Encode and decode Base64 strings
🔗 Encode
URL Encode/Decode
Encode and decode URL components and query strings
.* Test
Regex Tester
Test regular expressions with live match highlighting
⏱ Convert
Timestamp Converter
Convert between Unix timestamps and human dates
⬤ Convert
Color Converter
Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL color formats
MD Preview
Markdown Preview
Write Markdown and see the rendered output live
404 Reference
HTTP Status Codes
Searchable reference for all HTTP status codes
± Compare
Diff Checker
Compare two text blocks and highlight differences
🆔 Generate
UUID Generator
Generate UUID v4 (random), v5 (SHA-1), or bulk batches
⏰ Generate
CRON Builder
Build cron expressions visually and see next run times
⚙ Build
Regex Builder
Build regex patterns visually with live match highlighting
📦 Analyze
package.json Analyzer
Analyze dependencies, scripts, version ranges, and get insights
TS Generate
JSON → TS + Zod
Generate TypeScript interfaces and Zod schemas from any JSON
01 Convert
Number Base Converter
Convert between binary, octal, decimal, and hex in real time
Built by PunamIDE · All tools are free and run locally in your browser
